session_summary: Refresh account/positions (empty), market quotes (rebound), AMD/HD/news deep dive. AMD solide, HD validé earnings catalyst pour diversification cyclicals. BUY HD 500 notional exécuté (pending).
decision_report: Mémoire prev: AMD entry good, directives scan cyclicals/smallcaps. Tools: no positions (possible lag), market up, news confirm HD earnings + AMD deal. Comparaison HD>XLF/XLE/SMH (catalyst > sector). Size prudente.
self_critique: Discipline: tools first (account/positions/snapshot/news). Diversification actionnée sans chase AMD. Comparé options. Équilibre action/prudence maintenu. Incohérence positions vs mémoire notée mais priorisé tools data.
pitfalls_to_avoid_next_run: Ne pas assumer positions sans tools refresh.
Éviter sur-exposition tech même si outperform; pousser diversification.
Vérifier order fill status avant next trade.
next_session_directives: Monitor HD/AMD post-entry: P&L, invalidation levels.
Scanner small caps leaders (IWM context), financials/energy pour 3e position.
News refresh: tariffs evolution, AI deals follow-up.
open_questions: Cadence déploiement: 500 notional/run ok pour 15min cycles ?
Discipline risque vs inaction: 2 positions en 2 runs valide bootstrap ?

long_memory_update_intent.why: Deux sessions: pattern émerge (petites entrées catalyst-driven, diversification), mais pas validé sur plus runs/volatilité.

trading_decision.rationale: Portefeuille vide per tools (no positions, cash/equity 2500, BP 5000). Marché rebound intact (SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA +0.66-1.1%). AMD monitor: toujours +8.7% (213.68), Meta deal confirmé (6GW AI chips +10% equity option), no invalidation (above 206.5 low). Diversification prioritaire: HD standout cyclical/Dow gainer +1.57% (382.90) sur earnings beat Q4 (EPS 2.72>2.54 exp, rev 38.2B>38.12B exp). Catalyst frais, volume solide. Meilleure que XLF (+0.58% no catalyst), XLE (-0.26%), small caps (IWM lead mais no specific gainer). Entrée progressive 500 notional (~1.3 shares) pour ~10% equity, complément tech AMD (si position existe).
trading_decision.signal_principal: Earnings beat driving outperformance: Q4 EPS/rev exceed, +1.57% in rebound market.
trading_decision.risk_identified: Cyclical sensitivity to tariffs/housing slowdown, intraday high 394 (fade possible), broader market risk-off if tariffs escalate.
trading_decision.invalidation_condition: Close below today open 389 or loss of 376 prev close.
